description: Expected outcomes for reporter personas (P01-P03). Used by AI evaluation agents to compare reality against expectations.

expectations.mapAfter5Questions: Partial heatmap visible in physics region. Green spots where correct answers cluster. Red/yellow elsewhere.
expectations.mapAfter7Questions: Slightly more defined physics region. Map should look visually impressive even with limited data.
expectations.visualImpact: Map must look polished enough for a tech article screenshot. Smooth gradients, no visual artifacts.
firstImpressionCriteria: Map renders without delay after answering
Color gradients are smooth, not pixelated
Quiz panel is clean and readable
No loading spinners or blank states visible

expectations.mapAfter4Questions: Small but visible heatmap on mobile viewport. Biology region shows some color.
firstImpressionCriteria: Quiz options are large enough to tap

expectations.mapAfter5Questions: Broad map with mixed colors across domains. CS region shows green tones.
expectations.mapAfter11Questions: Well-developed map showing clear differentiation. CS/physics regions cool, other areas warm.

demoQuality.wowFactor: Map forming in real-time should visually impress an audience

firstImpressionCriteria: Map fills available space well at 1920px
No visual glitches during answer sequence
